case_title: MORGAN, JANICE P. VS PLATH AND COMPANY INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PLATH AND COMPANY INC.
